fato_historico: 1979: Iraqi President Ahmed Hassan al-Bakr resigns and is replaced by Saddam Hussein.
energia_do_dia: Today brings a fluid transition, much like the changing tides of leadership in distant lands once reshaped a nation's path. Perhaps it is a good time to release old burdens and welcome a new chapter with grace. Your sensitivity is your strength; trust your intuition to guide you toward the sunlight today. Consider that every ending invites a beautiful beginning.
frase_do_dia: The gentle tides of change carry you toward your brightest, most authentic self.
significado_numero: A powerful number representing hope and the alignment of your dreams.
conselho: Trust your heart and welcome the positive changes flowing into your life today.
